detail: Baseline and follow-up tutoring status must both be observed before new/never treatment status is assigned.
Core tutoring is built from Chinese, math, and English subject tutoring variables before sample filtering.
Subject-specific achievement models use the baseline-no-core-tutoring sample and control the other two newly started core-subject tutoring indicators.
Processed panel data, Fall 2013 analysis sample, sample flow, model results, diagnostics, and robustness tables are generated from raw data.
Baseline parent-questionnaire relative income and direct child-time variables are merged by student id and included in the covariate set.
